tags.description: Prominent low hill (350 foot elevation) on mainland East Falkland on the south side of Smylie Creek and east of Race Point. Named after FRANCIS, Lt. Kenneth David. (Royal Marines - 3rd Commando Brigade Air Squadron, Royal Marines)
tags.name: Francis Hill
tags.note: New placename in Nov 22 to mark 40th anniversary of the Falkland Islands conflict
